name: Excelerate Energy, Inc.
business: Excelerate Energy owns and operates LNG and natural gas infrastructure assets, providing regasification services and selling natural gas, LNG, power, and steam. The company's business is substantially supported by long-term, take-or-pay agreements with customers. As of December 31, 2025, the minimum contracted cash flows under terminal services contracts were approximately $3,315.2 million with a weighted average remaining term of 5.8 years.
namedCustomers: New Fortress Energy Inc. (acquired Jamaica business)

exposures.sentence: Excelerate owns and operates LNG and natural gas infrastructure assets. Once natural gas is liquefied, it needs an inlet into the countries where it will be consumed and Excelerate provides that home for LNG.

catalysts.event: Delivery of new floating regasification terminal
catalysts.sentence: We have one new floating regasification terminal currently being constructed by Hyundai Heavy Industries in South Korea, which we expect to take delivery of in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Start of Iraq LNG supply and regasification agreement
catalysts.sentence: It will be utilized in a five-year regasification and LNG supply agreement with Iraq's Ministry of Electricity, which we expect to commence in the third quarter of 2026.
Under the agreement, Petrobangla has agreed to purchase LNG from us, which began in the first quarter of 2026.
In May 2025, we closed the acquisition of 100% of the interests in New Fortress Energy Inc.'s business in Jamaica (the Acquisition).

tamClaims.claim: Global LNG demand is expected to increase to approximately 630 MTPA by 2030 from approximately 430 MTPA in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: As a result, global LNG demand is expected to increase to approximately 630 MTPA by 2030 from approximately 430 MTPA in 2025, according to the S&P Global.
